title: Sports Authority India Capital India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sports Authority India Capital India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sports Authority India Capital India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sports Authority India Capital India:
Sports Authority India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India Capital India!
